# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/api-gateway
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        paths:
        - /api/v1/users
        - /api/v1/users/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-service
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/payment-service
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - POST
        paths:
        - /api/v1/orders/*/payment
        - /api/v1/transactions
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-access-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/order-service
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/backend-service
        namespaces:
        - default
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - POST
        - GET
        paths:
        - /api/payment/process
        - /api/payment/status/*
        ports:
        - "8080"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-service-access-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/backend-service
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/analytics-service
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        paths:
        - /api/db/*
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: default
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/*
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: metrics-access-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      monitoring: enabled
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /metrics
        - /health
        - /ready
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals:
        - "*"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/public/*
    when:
    - key: request.headers[authorization]
      values:
      - Bearer*
  - to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /health
        - /version
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: internal-services-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      tier: internal
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/notification-service
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/email-service
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/messaging-service
        namespaces:
        - default
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - POST
        paths:
        - /api/internal/*
        ports:
        - "8080"
        - "9090"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: specific-path-method-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /api/v1/users/profile
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/admin-service
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/users/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/default/sa/auth-service
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - POST
        paths:
        - /api/v1/users/validate
        - /api/v1/users/authenticate
